---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or an improvement
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

What do you want to add or improve?

## Problem

What is missing or painful today?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behavior you want.

## Alternatives considered

List other approaches you tried or considered.

## Use case

Who needs this and in what scenario?

## Extra context

Links, screenshots, mockups, related issues, or related PRs.
